destination.description: Specifies the target destination where the data will be delivered, such as Amazon S3, Redshift, Elasticsearch, or another supported service.

kinesis_source_configuration.description: Defines the source configuration for the delivery stream, specifying the Kinesis data stream to use as input.

msk_source_configuration.description: Configuration details for the MSK source, including the ARN of the MSK cluster and topic to deliver messages from.
msk_source_configuration.type: list(object({msk_cluster_arn: string,read_from_timestamp: optional(string),topic_name: string,authentication_configuration: list(object({connectivity: string,role_arn: string}))}))

name.description: Name of the Kinesis Firehose delivery stream, required for identifying and managing the stream.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to categorize and organize the resource, supporting cost allocation and management.

timeouts.description: Defines the time duration for create, update, and delete operations for the delivery stream.
